messages.subject: Q1 pricing strategy — internal
messages.body_text:
Team,

A few notes on how the new pricing is landing three weeks in — attaching my comparison sheet for context.

- Growth ($19/mo) is converting faster than Pro ($29) was. 11 new logos since Jan 22.
- Enterprise ($99+usage) is still early — Cascade at $2,400/mo is our only reference.
- Key problem: prospects anchor on Datadog. When we say $19/mo they think it's a lite tier. We need tighter messaging on what's included.

For the $22K MRR target by Mar 31: at current Growth conversion we need ~8 more Growth customers OR one more Enterprise close. Meridian at $2,800 would close the gap alone.

[Note: Jason Liu at Ridgeway is on the CC by mistake — I meant to include him on a separate re-engagement note. Please treat this as internal.]

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Q1 pricing strategy — internal
messages.body_text:
Agreed on the Datadog anchoring issue. More data: when I quoted Ridgeway at $99+usage last month, Jason pushed back saying their Datadog contract is $8K/mo for API coverage and was surprised we were cheaper. I think we can charge more for Enterprise and frame it as a discount.

Also — for Meridian, are we flexible on $2,800 if they push back? I know Tessa is leading that deal but I want to know our floor for my conversations.

— Caleb Whitford
Account Executive, Vectrix Labs
caleb@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Q1 pricing strategy — [PRIVATE to you]
messages.body_text:
Caleb — hey. Please call me when you get this.

Jason Liu was on that CC. You just replied-all to a prospect. He can see everything you wrote — our MRR targets, our Meridian deal discussion, and that we may have pricing flexibility. Please do not reply to that thread again.

Not entirely your fault — I shouldn't have had him on the CC. But be more careful going forward.

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Following up — Ridgeway and Vectrix next steps
messages.body_text:
Hi Jason,

You were accidentally included on an internal thread from our side earlier today — apologies for any confusion that caused.

I wanted to reach out separately anyway. Since our last conversation in December, we've launched new pricing (Enterprise starts at $99/mo + usage, which is more predictable for a team your size) and we've completed our SAML SSO rollout via Clerk, which I recall was on your security checklist.

Would you be open to a 30-minute call next week to revisit?

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Following up — Ridgeway and Vectrix next steps
messages.body_text:
Hi Tessa,

No worries on the email mix-up — it happens to everyone. And the SSO timing is actually good; our security team just flagged it as a vendor requirement. Tuesday afternoon next week works if you have availability.

— Jason Liu
Engineering Manager, Ridgeway Financial
jason.liu@ridgewayfinancial.com
